Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. A new C++ back end for ocamlc 43 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Show HN: Git bayesect – Bayesian Git bisection for non-deterministic bugs 185 upvotes, 25 comments
  3. ZomboCom stolen by a hacker, sold, now replaced with AI-generated makeover 17 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. Jax's true calling: Ray-Marching renderers on WebGL 46 upvotes, 6 comments
  5. The revenge of the data scientist 82 upvotes, 16 comments
  6. How-to guide: Commissioning a Sensor Physics R&D Lab 26 upvotes, 3 comments
  7. Fast and Gorgeous Erosion Filter 38 upvotes, 6 comments
  8. Intuiting Pratt Parsing 141 upvotes, 45 comments
  9. Claude wrote a full FreeBSD remote kernel RCE with root shell 247 upvotes, 96 comments
  10. IPv6 address, as a sentence you can remember 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  11. Scientists crack a 20-year nuclear mystery behind the creation of gold 45 upvotes, 15 comments
  12. StepFun 3.5 Flash is #1 cost-effective model for OpenClaw tasks (300 battles) 132 upvotes, 59 comments
  13. Windows 95 defenses against installers that overwrite a file with an older one 106 upvotes, 53 comments
  14. "Special 301" Comments on Nintendo Game Piracy in Asia and Latin America (1994) 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  15. Set the Line Before It's Crossed 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  16. EmDash – A spiritual successor to WordPress that solves plugin security 441 upvotes, 316 comments
  17. DRAM pricing is killing the hobbyist SBC market 247 upvotes, 170 comments
  18. Signing data structures the wrong way 67 upvotes, 39 comments
  19. Show HN: Flight-Viz – 10K flights on a 3D globe in 3.5MB of Rust+WASM 54 upvotes, 30 comments
  20. Swappa.com for GrapheneOS compatible devices – Stay Away 81 upvotes, 51 comments
  21. Show HN: Dull – Instagram Without Reels, YouTube Without Shorts (iOS) 28 upvotes, 14 comments
  22. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (April 2026) 190 upvotes, 155 comments
  23. AI for American-produced cement and concrete 130 upvotes, 103 comments
  24. NASA’s Artemis II Crew Launches to the Moon 495 upvotes, 468 comments
  25. Show HN: Zerobox – Sandbox any command with file, network, credential controls 98 upvotes, 82 comments
  26. Random numbers, Persian code: A mysterious signal transfixes radio sleuths 104 upvotes, 107 comments
  27. Obfuscation is not security – AI can deobfuscate any minified JavaScript code 22 upvotes, 17 comments
  28. SpaceX files to go public 160 upvotes, 214 comments
  29. Ask HN: Who wants to be hired? (April 2026) 52 upvotes, 127 comments
